description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu System CI that runs daily at 3 am and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run on ubuntu-18.04 and ubuntu-20.04, checking out the repository, installing BioDynaMo with specific CMake flags, setting the INSTALL_DIR environment variable, and running valgrind tests, system tests, and out-of-source simulations. Finally, it notifies a Slack channel with a custom payload.
